examples: he dishonored his family by committing a serious crime

meanings.definition: compel through a sense of shame
examples: She shamed him into making amends

meanings.definition: surpass or beat by a wide margin

examples: She assumed indifference, even though she was seething with anger

meanings.definition: make believe with the intent to deceive
examples: He feigned that he was ill

meanings.definition: showing a sense of guilt; ; - Eric Linklater
examples: the hangdog and shamefaced air of the retreating enemy
